inline_comments.message: I see that the doFilter is overriden but could we directly inherit from the javax.servlet.Filter class instead of ifrom XacmlPdpAafFilter?  This is to avoid inheriting from the AAF infrastructure as it is currently disabled and AAF as a whole most likely will be discontinued in future releases.  Nice!
yes, we can do that.  If we do, though, it will mean that aaf will not work at all.  Are we sure we're ready to do that?

I think it is a reasonable assumption provided that has been disabled for several releases already.   In any case I was under the assumption that it was supported as the common *ServletFactory and HttpServletServer support multiple filters with the APIs, do you think there is a limitation there not working, or perhaps it would be in the RestServer wrapping them?  Ideally, would be good to support multiple filters if it was possible.

yeah! currently RestServer is taking in only one Filter class: https://github.com/onap/policy-common/blob/master/policy-endpoints/src/main/java/org/onap/policy/common/endpoints/http/server/RestServer.java#L59
. For passing multiple filter classes that will have to change to support a set of classes.
